org_profile.org_name: DAVID LAWRENCE MENTAL HEALTH CENTER, INC
data_coverage_notes: Organization is registered as a residential treatment facility but no residential per-diem codes appear in the data. Residential revenue is not captured here.
Crisis stabilization represents 23.1% of visible revenue.

peer_recommendations.description: Comprehensive BH systems with residential + outpatient
peer_recommendations.rationale: Org operates residential treatment alongside outpatient. Pure outpatient CMHCs are not comparable.
peer_recommendations.filter_logic: Orgs with taxonomy 251S or 322D that also bill outpatient codes

peer_recommendations.rationale: ACT is a specialized team-based service.
Crisis/Baker Act is a distinct service model.
